race.description: Gdsc Ramornie Handicap Day 15 July Hcp (C2)
race.comment: PATRIOTICINTENTION (6) starting to hit his straps and looks up to this class with Palmer's 3kg claim. Took control early and never headed with a dominant display saluting by 1.75 lens over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Finds a suitable race and can build on that winning record. PRINCE OF PROPHETS (1) rewarded for his consistency with a comprehensive 6 len victory over 1412m at Coffs Harbour in the heavy (8) going. Heading in the right direction and winning apprentice retains the ride. JUKEBOX IN SIBERIA (5) finds the right race today after mixing her form at the last three starts. Slow into stride and gave away too much start with a plugging sixth over 1350m at Doomben in C3 class. Value prospect. FALL FOR AUTUMN (8) deep into the campaign and due for a change of luck. Appreciated the firmer surface when he gripped on to run second over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Ready to go one better despite drawing out.
